title: slew2~

methods.description: sets new start point and goes back to target

body: [slew2~] is like [slew~] but has independent values for upwards & downwards ramps. It takes an amplitude limit per second and generates a line towards the incoming value. The difference between [slew~] and [glide~] is that [slew~] has a fixed speed, not a fixed period. A limit of zero stops the line generation and a negative value turns the limiter off (but again, up and down limits are independent).
